name: io.github.govindkavaturi-art/cueapi-mcp
description: Schedule agent work and report write-once outcomes via CueAPI from any MCP host.

environmentVariables.name: CUEAPI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: CueAPI API key. Generate at https://cueapi.ai

environmentVariables.name: CUEAPI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the CueAPI base URL for self-hosted instances. Defaults to https://api.cueapi.ai
